args.code:
import re, json
import pandas as pd

biz = pd.DataFrame(var_call_a2LZEnUweX5EfgqLuEyImv6X)
rev = pd.DataFrame(var_call_2TlYxBFieBDkenuDM7zpuo2Q)

# extract state abbreviation from description like 'in City, ST'
pat = re.compile(r"\bin\s+[A-Za-z .'-]+,\s*([A-Z]{2})\b")

def get_state(desc):
    if not isinstance(desc, str):
        return None
    m = pat.search(desc)
    return m.group(1) if m else None

biz['state'] = biz['description'].apply(get_state)
# keep US states only (exclude Canadian provinces like AB)
us_states = set(['AL','AK','AZ','AR','CA','CO','CT','DE','FL','GA','HI','ID','IL','IN','IA','KS','KY','LA','ME','MD','MA','MI','MN','MS','MO','MT','NE','NV','NH','NJ','NM','NY','NC','ND','OH','OK','OR','PA','RI','SC','SD','TN','TX','UT','VT','VA','WA','WV','WI','WY','DC'])
biz_us = biz[biz['state'].isin(us_states)].copy()

# map businessid_X -> businessref_X
biz_us['business_ref'] = biz_us['business_id'].str.replace('businessid_', 'businessref_', regex=False)

# join to avg rating per business
rev['avg_rating'] = rev['avg_rating'].astype(float)
merged = biz_us.merge(rev, on='business_ref', how='left')

# count businesses with wifi per state
state_counts = merged.groupby('state', dropna=False).agg(
    wifi_business_count=('business_id','count'),
    avg_rating_for_wifi_businesses=('avg_rating','mean')
).reset_index()

# highest count
state_counts = state_counts.sort_values(['wifi_business_count','avg_rating_for_wifi_businesses'], ascending=[False, False])
top = state_counts.iloc[0].to_dict()
# round avg rating
if pd.isna(top['avg_rating_for_wifi_businesses']):
    avg_r = None
else:
    avg_r = round(float(top['avg_rating_for_wifi_businesses']), 3)

result = {
    'state': top['state'],
    'wifi_business_count': int(top['wifi_business_count']),
    'average_rating': avg_r
}
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(result))

biz_us = biz[biz['state'].isin(us_states)].copy()

val_args.code:
import re, json
import pandas as pd

biz = pd.DataFrame(var_call_K4tmPhF3e1bbSrMHq7i2Xw72)
rev = pd.DataFrame(var_call_2TlYxBFieBDkenuDM7zpuo2Q)

pat = re.compile(r"\bin\s+[A-Za-z .'-]+,\s*([A-Z]{2})\b")

def get_state(desc):
    if not isinstance(desc, str):
        return None
    m = pat.search(desc)
    return m.group(1) if m else None

biz['state'] = biz['description'].apply(get_state)

us_states = set(['AL','AK','AZ','AR','CA','CO','CT','DE','FL','GA','HI','ID','IL','IN','IA','KS','KY','LA','ME','MD','MA','MI','MN','MS','MO','MT','NE','NV','NH','NJ','NM','NY','NC','ND','OH','OK','OR','PA','RI','SC','SD','TN','TX','UT','VT','VA','WA','WV','WI','WY','DC'])

biz_us = biz[biz['state'].isin(us_states)].copy()

biz_us['business_ref'] = biz_us['business_id'].str.replace('businessid_', 'businessref_', regex=False)
rev['avg_rating'] = rev['avg_rating'].astype(float)
merged = biz_us.merge(rev, on='business_ref', how='left')

state_counts = merged.groupby('state').agg(
    wifi_business_count=('business_id','count'),
    avg_rating_for_wifi_businesses=('avg_rating','mean')
).reset_index()

state_counts = state_counts.sort_values(['wifi_business_count','avg_rating_for_wifi_businesses'], ascending=[False, False])
top = state_counts.iloc[0].to_dict()

result = {
    'state': top['state'],
    'wifi_business_count': int(top['wifi_business_count']),
    'average_rating': round(float(top['avg_rating_for_wifi_businesses']), 3)
}

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(result))

val_args.code:
import re, json
import pandas as pd

biz = pd.DataFrame(var_call_K4tmPhF3e1bbSrMHq7i2Xw72)
rev = pd.DataFrame(var_call_2TlYxBFieBDkenuDM7zpuo2Q)

pat = re.compile(r"\bin\s+[A-Za-z .'-]+,\s*([A-Z]{2})\b")

def get_state(desc):
    if not isinstance(desc, str):
        return None
    m = pat.search(desc)
    return m.group(1) if m else None

biz['state'] = biz['description'].apply(get_state)

us_states = set(['AL','AK','AZ','AR','CA','CO','CT','DE','FL','GA','HI','ID','IL','IN','IA','KS','KY','LA','ME','MD','MA','MI','MN','MS','MO','MT','NE','NV','NH','NJ','NM','NY','NC','ND','OH','OK','OR','PA','RI','SC','SD','TN','TX','UT','VT','VA','WA','WV','WI','WY','DC'])

biz_us = biz[biz['state'].isin(us_states)].copy()

if biz_us.empty:
    result = {
        'error': 'No US businesses with WiFi found after parsing state from description.',
        'parsed_states_value_counts': biz['state'].value_counts(dropna=False).to_dict()
    }
else:
    biz_us['business_ref'] = biz_us['business_id'].str.replace('businessid_', 'businessref_', regex=False)
    rev['avg_rating'] = rev['avg_rating'].astype(float)
    merged = biz_us.merge(rev, on='business_ref', how='left')

    state_counts = merged.groupby('state').agg(
        wifi_business_count=('business_id','count'),
        avg_rating_for_wifi_businesses=('avg_rating','mean')
    ).reset_index()

    state_counts = state_counts.sort_values(['wifi_business_count','avg_rating_for_wifi_businesses'], ascending=[False, False])
    top = state_counts.iloc[0].to_dict()
    result = {
        'state': top['state'],
        'wifi_business_count': int(top['wifi_business_count']),
        'average_rating': None if pd.isna(top['avg_rating_for_wifi_businesses']) else round(float(top['avg_rating_for_wifi_businesses']), 3)
    }

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(result))
